overall.description: Aerial drone footage from a game engine showing a smooth forward flight over a vast grassland prairie during golden hour. The camera approaches a central ruined stone temple structure amidst rolling hills and scattered vegetation, with warm sunlight casting long shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland prairie with distant ruins

agents.ego_description: piloting drone steadily forward over the landscape at high altitude, surveying the expansive terrain

entered.detail: ancient stone temple ruins standing alone in the prairie
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon
large boulders and rock formations dotting the landscape
small groups of trees scattered across the grassland

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a vast grassland prairie during golden hour. The drone moves steadily forward over rolling terrain dotted with scattered trees and rock formations, approaching a distant ruined stone structure that stands prominently in the center of the landscape.

events.description: camera approaches close enough to reveal detailed architectural features of the stone ruins

agents.ego_description: continuing drone flight at lower altitude, closely inspecting the ruined structure and surrounding terrain

entered.detail: scattered broken stones and rubble around the ruin base
collapsed columns and fragmented walls of the ancient structure
remaining sections of stone walls overgrown with grass

segments.scene_description: The drone descends slightly and moves closer to the central ruins, revealing detailed stone architecture including broken columns and scattered debris. The distant mountains fade from view as the camera focuses on the textures of the ancient structure and the immediate grassy surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide across a vast grassland prairie that gradually narrows its focus onto the intricate details of an ancient ruin. It begins with a wide view of rolling terrain dotted with scattered trees and rock formations, moving steadily forward under the warm glow of golden hour. As the drone advances, the distant mountains fade from view and the camera descends slightly to close the gap with the central stone structure. The scene then shifts from the expansive landscape to a detailed exploration of the ruins, revealing broken columns and scattered debris amidst the immediate grassy surroundings.
